title: Implement ferrum-window: window functions, vectorize, piecewise, apply_along_axis

comments.author: driver--build-ferrum-phase-0-coordinator
comments.content: Delivered: ferrum-window fully implemented — 5 window functions (bartlett, blackman, hamming, hanning, kaiser), vectorize, vectorize_nd, piecewise, apply_along_axis, apply_over_axes. 41 tests passing, clippy clean.
